news.t: Costs vs. Retirement: The Case for TIPS ETFs
Northern Trust Launches Fixed Income ETF Suites

overview.description: The Northern Trust 2055 Inflation-Linked Distributing Ladder ETF (TIPD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, providing inflation-protected income and return of principal through a ladder of US Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities maturing around 2055. TIPD was launched on Aug 18, 2025 and is issued by Northern Trust.

data.title: Costs vs. Retirement: The Case for TIPS ETFs
data.text: Now and then, advisors need to get a sense of how Americans of all ages approach retirement planning. Back in March, Fidelity Investments released its 2026 State of Retirement Planning Study.

data.title: Northern Trust Launches Fixed Income ETF Suites
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Northern Trust Asset Management has launched three suites of fixed income ETFs today. The 11 new ETFs are the first funds under the new Northern Trust ETFs brand. Two suites ...
